title: serratula mairei
intro: Serratula mairei, also known as French burnet or burnet, is a perennial herbaceous plant in the family Asteraceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and promoting wound healing. Serratula mairei can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves and flowers can be used fresh or dried for various herbal preparations.
